title: Golden Chicken Bowl
description: A delicious, smoky chicken bowl inspired by Portuguese flavors, served with a side of golden goodness.
instructions: Season the chicken breast with salt, black pepper, and portuguese seasoning.
Heat 1 tbsp of olive oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Sear the chicken breast for 5-6 minutes per side, or until cooked through.
Transfer the chicken to a plate and let it rest for 5 minutes.
Toss the cubed potatoes with the remaining 1 tbsp of olive oil, smoky paprika, and salt.
Spread the potatoes on a baking sheet and roast in the oven for 20-25 minutes, or until golden brown.
Slice the rested chicken breast into thin strips.
Serve the chicken strips over the golden potatoes, garnished with fresh herbs if desired.
